base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemies_bosses_batch — a character (boss) from 1995 chrono trigger. Enemies + bosses across 7 eras. Final: Lavos (planet-destroying alien parasite) with Shell/Core/Bit/Mammon forms. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Enemies + bosses across 7 eras. Final: Lavos (planet-destroying alien parasite) with Shell/Core/Bit/Mammon forms
